extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan attacked with 1km remaining on gravel climb to Campo Felice, dropped CICCONE who briefly followed, took pink jersey from VALTER
tactical_patterns: Ineos delayed their tempo work until final 30km, avoiding early energy expenditure despite gc threats in breakaway.
BERNAL shifted to big ring on gravel climb, unusual gear choice suggesting pre-recon of surface grip conditions.
VLASOV attacked before Ineos pace ramped, revealing inability to respond once Moscone-led train began drilling.
BOUCHARD accumulated mountain points across multiple climbs while in break, targeting jersey not stage win tactically.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: sprinted entire final kilometer uphill on gravel, form clearly superior to recent seasons
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: only rider who could briefly follow Bernal's acceleration, held second at 7 seconds
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: attacked too early before Ineos tempo, finished third but clearly unable to match Bernal's acceleration
rider_signals.VALTER Attila: negative: lost 49 seconds and pink jersey, crossing in 25th suggests inability to handle gravel gradient combination
rider_signals.CARR Simon: neutral: animating break from 30km mark shows aggressive racing but lacked power for final gravel pitch
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: drilling pace for Ineos on gravel approach set up Bernal perfectly, team execution clinical
